scenarios.name: AI Coding — Summit Supply E-commerce Demo
scenarios.description: A small Next.js outdoor-gear storefront (Summit Supply). Designed for demoing AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, or Lovable in Slack.

bug_fix: @[AI Tool] we're getting reports that customers can't complete checkout on the Summit Supply site — they fill in the form, hit 'Place order', and get an error. Can you take a look and open a PR with a fix?
feature: @[AI Tool] can you add a wishlist feature to the Summit Supply site? Customers should be able to favorite products from the catalog with a heart icon, see a count in the header, and view their wishlist on a dedicated page.

runbook: Provision your demo repo: repomatic provision ai-demo
Install your AI's Slack app (e.g. Claude Code or Codex) and connect it to your demo repo.
Run the storefront locally so your audience can see it: cd into the repo, npm install && npm run dev
Pick a scenario (bug fix or feature) and paste the relevant prompt from the list above into Slack, mentioning your AI tool.
Review the PR the AI opens. Merge it. Refresh the storefront to see the change live.
When you're ready to demo again: repomatic reset ai-demo
